Welcome

I have Creative Design Experience

I'm Bintang Ridwan Pribadi, a dedicated student and developer. I build reliable systems and creative designs to solve digital problems.

Contact Me View Portfolio

Satisfied clients

Reviews given

My Skills

UI/UX Design

Creating intuitive interfaces and user experiences with a focus on usability.

Backend Development

Building scalable systems using Laravel, PHP, and clean database architectures.

Graphic Design

Specializing in minimalist and modern visual communication for digital platforms.

My Portfolio

HackerRank Solve

Simple ways to solve complex algorithm challenges.

View Project
Minimalist Login

Animated and clean login page design using modern CSS.

My Achievements

Professional Certifications

Validated expertise through recognized institutions and industry leaders.

Laravel Backend Dev

Advanced backend development with Laravel framework, database architecture, and RESTful API.

Google UI/UX Design

Comprehensive user experience design, wireframing, and interactive prototyping.

Flutter Mobile Expert

Cross-platform mobile application development with Dart and Flutter framework.

CV

Back End Developer & Technology Student

Basics

Name Bintang Ridwan Pribadi Label Back End Developer Email selamat.angkatan.corona@gmail.com Phone +62 813-8131-9442 Summary Student at Telkom University with 2 years of experience in Graphic Design and currently focusing on Backend Development. Expert in PHP (Laravel), Flutter, and database management.

Work

Financial App Developer 2025 - Present
PMI (Palang Merah Indonesia) - Project
  • Developed a financial management system for Palang Merah Indonesia.
  • Integrated Laravel backend with secure database handling.
  • Optimized reporting features for better financial transparency.
UI/UX & Graphic Designer 2023 - 2025
Freelance
  • Created over 50+ digital assets for various clients.
  • Designed "My Tel-U" campus app interface for traffic status features.

Education

Bachelor of Software Engineering 2022 - Present
Telkom University

Focusing on Software Architecture, Web Development, and Mobile Programming.

Skills

Programming & Frameworks

PHP, Laravel, Dart, Flutter, JavaScript, Vue.js, Quasar, Kotlin, MySql.

Development Tools

Git, GitHub, SonarQube, Android Studio, VS Code, Figma.

Languages

Indonesian

Native Speaker

English

Conversational / Professional

© 2026 Bintang Ridwan Pribadi. Powered by passion for code.
